title: Capurodendron microlobum
taxonomy: Capurodendron microlobum is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Madagascar. The plant's classification places it within the genus Capurodendron. Capurodendron microlobum is further classified as a member of the order Sapindales. Capurodendron microlobum is a species of tree with distinctive small leaves.
